creator: info@aballesta.es
text:
From Rel. 6.2 (first time installed in this server), this issue is present.
The kernel are NOT detect nothing of PS/2, psm or mouse. The BIOS is
upgraded to latest known. All other SO, the mouse detection is correctly.

"Medium" priority because I look many issues detected similar, reported
from many time.

Fix: 

Detecting more hardware, through older. I'm not expert in C#, so cannot help.
How-To-Repeat: Allways, only in FreeBSD.
